pages.text: I hugged the neighbor’s cat, Ben. Ben said, “Meow?” MEOW?
I hugged the old cat who lives under the park bench. He squiggled and he wriggled.
I hugged Mrs Lilly’s He licked my face. tubby, ginger cat. “Slurp, slurp, slurp.” SLURP!
I hugged the cat who eats outside the fish and chips shop. He went, OM, NOM, NOM.
I even hugged the grumpy cat who doesn’t like hugs! He yowled and yowled! YOWL!
I hugged a long cat. I hugged a short cat. I hugged an old cat. I hugged a young cat.
I hugged a Mommy cat, and every kitten she had.
I tried to hug the big cats at the zoo, NO! but the zookeeper said,
I climbed on the bus and hugged the cat that was hiding in an old lady’s bag. The old lady shrieked! SHRIEK!
I went home and got into bed. YAWN!
Some furry things and hugged me. snuck in...
